title: Cannot invite people to boards that I own
excerpt:
Hello, 
when I try to invite people to boards that I created / own, sometimes I can invite them, but sometimes I get the following error screen: 
  
I excplictly AM the owner of the board and wear my crown :wink: 
Funny …

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

when I try to invite people to boards that I created / own, sometimes I can invite them, but sometimes I get the following error screen:

image1024×947 70.9 KB

I excplictly AM the owner of the board and wear my crown

Funny enough:
When I duplicate my board, I can invite people to the duplicated board. But then, after a while some boards give me the same error again.

I could invite 2 people of my team onto this shared board, when trying to invite other people the screen popped back up again.

image1211×653 32.7 KB

I use monday for 2.5 years now, but this issue is new to me.

What am I missing? Is this a bug? Is it related to a new feature and I have not setup some necessary framework to invite people to my boards?

Help is highly appreciated, as it stops me from inviting people to project boards with strict timelines.

EDIT: If I click invite about a dozen times, sometimes I get the cactus now, sometimes I can invite people. This seems to be a monday issue?

Thanks in advance.
Timo

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Being that it shows it has “NO Members”, I’m leaning towards a bug. Can you invite yourself?

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
When the “cactus screen” shows up, I cannot invite anybody.

I also lean towards bug, as when I click the “invite” button repeatedly, after 5 or 6 tries I do not get the error screen but can actually invite people.

So I think it is a monday.com problem, sadly the platform has had a higher amount of issues lately.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I just had the same issue come up on my account. I put in a ticket with support, if you haven’t yet, I’d recommend doing so. support@monday.com
